name: API Gateway
description: Standalone RESTful API gateway for OpenClaw runtime integration.

port.description: HTTP server port (can also be set via API_GATEWAY_PORT env var)

host.description: HTTP server bind address (can also be set via API_GATEWAY_HOST env var)

apiKey.description: API key for x-api-key header authentication (can also be set via API_GATEWAY_KEY env var)

corsOrigin.description: CORS allowed origin (can also be set via CORS_ORIGIN env var)

ipWhitelist.description: Comma-separated CIDR ranges for IP whitelist (can also be set via API_GATEWAY_IP_WHITELIST env var)

rateLimit.description: Max requests per minute per IP (can also be set via API_GATEWAY_RATE_LIMIT env var)

agentTimeoutMs.description: Agent execution timeout in milliseconds (can also be set via AGENT_TIMEOUT_MS env var)

taskTtlMs.description: Async task result TTL in milliseconds (can also be set via TASK_TTL_MS env var)
